title: Curio - REKT
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls cook() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: small number of CGT tokens acquired
monitoring_rules: BLOCK cook() if preceded by a flash loan borrow in the same transaction
summary: The Curio DAO suffered a $16M loss due to a governance attack where an attacker acquired a small number of CGT tokens, elevated their voting power, and executed a delegate call to a malicious contract. A guard could have blocked this by preventing any tx that calls cook() after a flash loan borrow.
